Accuracy Bonuses.name: Accurate Attack
Accuracy Bonuses.effect: +Tier to Accuracy rolls, -Tier to Damage and Condition rolls

Accuracy Bonuses.name: Reliable Accuracy
Accuracy Bonuses.effect: Advantage on Accuracy rolls, -4 penalty to all Accuracy rolls
Accuracy Bonuses.usage: Consistent hitting with reduced total bonus

Accuracy Bonuses.name: Critical Accuracy
Accuracy Bonuses.effect: Critical hit range expanded to 15-20 on d20

Accuracy Bonuses.name: Powerful Critical
Accuracy Bonuses.effect: Add Tier bonus again to Damage and Condition rolls on critical hits
Accuracy Bonuses.usage: Enhances critical hit effect roll strength

Accuracy Bonuses.name: Overhit
Accuracy Bonuses.effect: When Accuracy exceeds target Avoidance by 5+, add half the difference to Effect roll
Accuracy Bonuses.usage: Rewards high accuracy against low-defense targets

Accuracy Bonuses.name: Blitz
Accuracy Bonuses.effect: +1 Accuracy per 6 spaces moved toward target this turn
Accuracy Bonuses.usage: Mobile attacker bonus, stacks with movement

Accuracy Bonuses.name: Ricochet
Accuracy Bonuses.effect: Critical hits trigger additional attack against different target within range
Accuracy Bonuses.restriction: Secondary attack cannot crit from target being Stunned
Accuracy Bonuses.exclusion: Cannot trigger from Double-Tap, Explosive Critical, or other Ricochet

Accuracy Bonuses.name: Double-Tap
Accuracy Bonuses.effect: Critical hits trigger same attack again against same target
Accuracy Bonuses.restriction: Secondary attack cannot crit from target being Stunned
Accuracy Bonuses.exclusion: Cannot trigger from Ricochet, Explosive Critical, or other Double-Tap

Accuracy Bonuses.name: Explosive Critical
Accuracy Bonuses.effect: Critical hits trigger attack against all enemies within 3 spaces of target
Accuracy Bonuses.restriction: Cannot apply to AOE attacks, secondary attacks cannot crit from Stun
Accuracy Bonuses.exclusion: Cannot trigger from Double-Tap, Ricochet, or other Explosive Critical

Core Damage Modifiers.name: Power Attack
Core Damage Modifiers.effect: +Tier to Damage rolls, -Tier to Accuracy rolls

Core Damage Modifiers.name: High Impact
Core Damage Modifiers.effect: Replace 3d6 damage roll with flat 15 damage
Core Damage Modifiers.usage: Eliminates damage variance for consistent output

Core Damage Modifiers.name: Enhanced Effect
Core Damage Modifiers.effect: Add one additional damage die to damage rolls

Dice Manipulation.name: Reliable Effect
Dice Manipulation.effect: Roll extra die on damage and condition rolls, drop lowest result

Dice Manipulation.name: Critical Effect
Dice Manipulation.effect: All effect dice explode on rolls of 5 or 6
Dice Manipulation.usage: Dice continue rolling when showing 5-6, cumulative

Armor and Defense Bypass.name: Armor Piercing
Armor and Defense Bypass.effect: -Tier to Attack rolls, ignore target's Durability Endurance bonus
Armor and Defense Bypass.note: For Direct attacks, reduce Damage roll instead of Attack roll

Armor and Defense Bypass.name: Brutal
Armor and Defense Bypass.effect: When Damage roll exceeds target Durability by 10+, deal extra damage equal to half the difference
Armor and Defense Bypass.bannedCombination: Cannot combine with Heavy Strike or Headshot

Damage Over Time and Area.name: Bleed
Damage Over Time and Area.effect: Target takes identical damage again at end of your next 2 turns

Damage Over Time and Area.name: Splash Damage
Damage Over Time and Area.effect: Adjacent targets take Tier+1d6 damage if Attack roll would hit their Avoidance
Damage Over Time and Area.usage: Applies to Melee and Ranged attacks only

Damage Over Time and Area.name: Environmental
Damage Over Time and Area.effect: All hexes hit by attack become hazardous terrain
Damage Over Time and Area.hazardEffect: Deal attack's Damage and Condition to any character entering or ending turn in hex

Utility Effects.name: Shatter
Utility Effects.effect: Deal double damage to structures and vehicles

Utility Effects.name: Leech
Utility Effects.effect: Regain HP equal to half damage dealt

Instant Defeat Mechanics.name: Finishing Blow
Instant Defeat Mechanics.effect: If attack reduces enemy to 5×tier HP or below, enemy is defeated instead

Instant Defeat Mechanics.name: Culling Strike
Instant Defeat Mechanics.effect: If attack reduces enemy below 1/5 maximum HP, enemy is defeated instead

Condition Bonuses.name: Critical Condition
Condition Bonuses.effect: Condition rolls critical hit on 15-20 range

Condition Bonuses.name: Lasting Condition
Condition Bonuses.effect: If Condition roll exceeds Resistance by 10+, condition duration extends by 1 turn

Condition Bonuses.name: Mass Effect
Condition Bonuses.effect: Single Direct condition attack targets up to Tier enemies simultaneously

Condition Bonuses.name: Collateral Condition
Condition Bonuses.effect: Successful condition triggers attack against all targets within 3-space burst
Condition Bonuses.restriction: Cannot apply to AOE attacks, triggers only once per attack

Condition Bonuses.name: Contagious
Condition Bonuses.effect: Successful condition triggers attack against nearest enemy

Condition Bonuses.name: Cursed
Condition Bonuses.effect: If 2×(Condition roll - Resistance) ≥ target's remaining HP, condition becomes permanent

Condition Bonuses.name: Overwhelming Affliction
Condition Bonuses.effect: If Condition roll exceeds Resistance by 3×Tier, condition becomes permanent regardless of target HP

Melee Specialization.name: Heavy Strike
Melee Specialization.requirement: Expend all Movement and one Quick Action to charge
Melee Specialization.effect: +3×Tier to Damage and Condition rolls, -Tier to Accuracy rolls

Melee Specialization.name: Quick Strikes
Melee Specialization.requirement: Expend all Movement and one Quick Action to charge
Melee Specialization.effect: Make same Melee attack three times against single target, -Tier to Accuracy rolls

Melee Specialization.name: Whirlwind Strike
Melee Specialization.effect: Single Melee attack targets up to Tier enemies simultaneously

Ranged Specialization.name: Headshot
Ranged Specialization.requirement: Expend all Movement and one Quick Action to charge
Ranged Specialization.effect: +3×Tier to Damage and Condition rolls, -Tier to Accuracy rolls

Ranged Specialization.name: Barrage
Ranged Specialization.requirement: Expend all Movement and one Quick Action to charge
Ranged Specialization.effect: Make same Ranged attack three times against single target, -Tier to Accuracy rolls

Ranged Specialization.name: Scatter Shot
Ranged Specialization.effect: Single Ranged attack targets up to Tier enemies simultaneously

Universal Combat Techniques.name: Flurry of Blows
Universal Combat Techniques.effect: Make same attack three times against single target
Universal Combat Techniques.effectModifier: -Tier to Accuracy, Damage, and Condition rolls
Universal Combat Techniques.usage: Works with Melee or Ranged attacks

Universal Combat Techniques.name: Pounce
Universal Combat Techniques.effect: Move up to 6 spaces in straight line toward target as part of attack

Universal Combat Techniques.name: Splinter
Universal Combat Techniques.effect: Defeating enemy triggers another attack against new target before turn ends

Tactical Enhancements.name: Menacing
Tactical Enhancements.effect: Reducing enemy to 0 HP allows Intimidation attempt against all enemies within 3 spaces
Tactical Enhancements.surrenderThreshold: Enemies with HP ≤ Intimidation bonus surrender

Tactical Enhancements.name: Disengage
Tactical Enhancements.effect: Successful hit prevents opportunity attacks from all hit targets until end of turn

Tactical Enhancements.name: Extra Attack
Tactical Enhancements.effect: Successful hit with successful effect allows identical attack against same target
Tactical Enhancements.usage: Must hit and succeed on both Accuracy and Effect

Sequential Attack Systems.name: Analyzing Strike
Sequential Attack Systems.effect: +1 to chosen stat (Accuracy/Damage/Conditions) per previous Analyzing Strike against same target
Sequential Attack Systems.resetCondition: Bonus resets if you skip attacking target for one turn
Sequential Attack Systems.limitation: Only one target can have Analyzing Strike bonus at any time

Sequential Attack Systems.name: Follow-Up Strike
Sequential Attack Systems.effect: Successful hit with successful effect allows one Base Attack against same target

Sequential Attack Systems.name: Counterattack
Sequential Attack Systems.effect: Using attack against enemy that missed you or failed their effect adds Tier to chosen roll
Sequential Attack Systems.bonusSelection: Choose Accuracy, Damage, or Condition when purchasing
Sequential Attack Systems.restriction: Cannot use with limits requiring you to be attacked or affected

Sequential Attack Systems.name: Exploit
Sequential Attack Systems.effect: +Tier to Damage and Condition rolls against targets currently afflicted by any Condition

Combat Control.name: Priority Target
Combat Control.effect: After hitting target, mark them as Priority Target until start of next turn
Combat Control.allyBonus: Other characters gain Tier/2 Accuracy bonus against marked target (rounded up)

Combat Control.name: Bully
Combat Control.effect: Damaging target with Power score equal to or less than yours allows 1-space forced movement

Combat Control.name: Martial Artist
Combat Control.effect: Critical hits allow choice of Grab, 3-space forced movement, or Prone condition

Combat Control.name: Grappler
Combat Control.effect: +Tier damage against targets you have Grabbed
Combat Control.requirement: Must have Grab condition active on target

Enemy Type Bonuses.name: Minion Slayer
Enemy Type Bonuses.effect: Bonus applies against 10 maximum HP enemies

Enemy Type Bonuses.name: Captain Slayer
Enemy Type Bonuses.effect: Bonus applies against 25 maximum HP enemies

Enemy Type Bonuses.name: Elite Slayer
Enemy Type Bonuses.effect: Bonus applies against 50 maximum HP enemies

Enemy Type Bonuses.name: Boss Slayer
Enemy Type Bonuses.effect: Bonus applies against 100 maximum HP enemies

Resource-Based Bonuses.name: Lucky Strike
Resource-Based Bonuses.effect: Using Effort on this attack allows rolling extra die on the Effort roll

Resource-Based Bonuses.name: Compressed Release
Resource-Based Bonuses.effect: Disable Aura until start of next turn, +Tier to Accuracy, Damage and Condition rolls

Environmental Bonuses.name: Domain
Environmental Bonuses.effect: +Tier to chosen roll when attacking targets within your Barrier

Environmental Bonuses.name: Tower Defense
Environmental Bonuses.effect: +Tier to chosen roll when attacking targets on opposite side of your Wall

Sustained Attack Systems.name: Channeled
Sustained Attack Systems.effect: Spend Primary Action + Movement on subsequent turns to repeat attack
Sustained Attack Systems.scaling: +Tier to chosen roll for each consecutive turn channeling (maximum 5 turns)

Sustained Attack Systems.name: Focused
Sustained Attack Systems.effect: Spend Primary Action + Movement on subsequent turns to repeat attack
Sustained Attack Systems.scaling: +Tier to chosen roll for each consecutive turn focusing (maximum 5 turns)
